curation_notes: Patch commit d395054dc2c3 is a merge commit from the private repo (canonical/fix/cloud-spec-auth-3.6) that fixes the CloudSpec authorization bypass along with a macaroon token race condition. 11 files changed (8 non-test), making this a noisy patch. The primary vulnerability location was derived from the advisory description which explicitly names the CloudSpec method on the Controller facade, confirmed by the diff which adds authorization checks (superuser/model admin permission verification) to the CloudSpec function in the common cloudspec package. The pre-patch code only checks basic model tag authorization via getAuthFunc but does not verify elevated privileges before returning credential details.
